title: On the Holy Spirit: Co-Equal with the Father
description: Basil's defense of the divinity of the Holy Spirit — the text that settled Trinitarian theology.
introduction: Basil's defense of the divinity of the Holy Spirit — the text that settled Trinitarian theology.

translation.text: The Spirit is called holy, just as the Father is holy and the Son is holy. Holiness is the Spirit's nature, not an acquired attribute.
